channel.title: 404 not found when using public API
channel.description:
Basically I've created a new Frontity project with the mars theme and have updated the settings file to point to the public api of my free wordpress.com hosted site. However, I am receiving a 404 on the page when it compiles. I've included a screenshot of my settings file which I believe is formatted correctly along with the error message.
Any assistance at all would be amazing.
[Screenshot 2020-11-30 at 10.37.02 am|506x500](upload://AgFnxvbwgUxOGQKfu7it0YjIj4F.png)

item.title: 404 not found when using public API
item.dc:creator: spasmochi
item.description:
Figured it out. I needed to change URL to API in my settings

Read full topic
item.source: 404 not found when using public API

item.title: 404 not found when using public API

item.description:
Basically I’ve created a new Frontity project with the mars theme and have updated the settings file to point to the public api of my free wordpress.com hosted site. However, I am receiving a 404 on the page when it compiles. I’ve included a screenshot of my settings file which I believe is formatted correctly along with the error message.

Any assistance at all would be amazing.
